parts.title: Cross-Curricular Work
prompts: Create a detailed plan for a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. climate change] for a [grade X] class, with three lessons integrating [subject 1, e.g. Science] and [subject 2, e.g. Social Studies], and a reflection linked to [reference to current curriculum].
Give me five ideas for cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that combine [subject 1, e.g. Mathematics] and [subject 2, e.g. Art], with a brief description and a goal for each.

Write a short guide for a [grade X] teacher to plan a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. space], with three steps integrating [subject 1, e.g. Science] and [subject 2, e.g. Swedish], and a link to [reference to current curriculum].

Suggest three cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that combine [subject 1, e.g. PE] and [subject 2, e.g. Science], with one activity for each and a rationale for how it supports a holistic approach.
Create a list of five short cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that integrate [subject 1, e.g. Social Studies] and [subject 2, e.g. Music], with an introductory activity for each.

Give me an example of a routine for a [grade X] teacher to launch a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. the Middle Ages], with three steps combining [subject 1, e.g. History] and [subject 2, e.g. Art].

Suggest three ways for a [grade X] teacher to integrate [subject 1, e.g. Technology] and [subject 2, e.g. Mathematics] in a theme on [specific theme, e.g. bridge building], with a hands-on exercise for each.

Create a cross-curricular plan for a [grade X] class on [specific theme, e.g. water], with three activities integrating [subject 1, e.g. Science] and [subject 2, e.g. Swedish], and a closing presentation.

Give me five ideas for cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that combine [subject 1, e.g. English] and [subject 2, e.g. Social Studies], with a brief description and a link to [reference to current curriculum] for each.

Write a short template for a [grade X] teacher to use when planning a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. sustainability], with three steps integrating [subject 1, e.g. Science] and [subject 2, e.g. Social Studies].

Suggest three ways for a [grade X] teacher to collaborate with a colleague to create a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. democracy] combining [subject 1, e.g. Social Studies] and [subject 2, e.g. Swedish], with one idea for each.
Give me an example of a cross-curricular lesson for a [grade X] class on [specific theme, e.g. migration], with three steps integrating [subject 1, e.g. History] and [subject 2, e.g. Geography].
Create a list of five cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that integrate [subject 1, e.g. Mathematics] and [subject 2, e.g. Technology], with a practical application for each.
Suggest three cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that combine [subject 1, e.g. Music] and [subject 2, e.g. History], with a creative activity for each and a reflection.

Write a short guide for a [grade X] teacher to plan a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. food and health], with three steps integrating [subject 1, e.g. Home Economics] and [subject 2, e.g. Science].
Give me five ideas for cross-curricular themes for a [grade X] class that combine [subject 1, e.g. PE] and [subject 2, e.g. Mathematics], with a movement-based activity for each.

Suggest three ways for a [grade X] teacher to use digital tools in a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. space], integrating [subject 1, e.g. Science] and [subject 2, e.g. Technology], with one idea for each.

Create a plan for a [grade X] teacher to carry out a cross-curricular theme on [specific theme, e.g. the Viking Age], with three lessons combining [subject 1, e.g. History] and [subject 2, e.g. Crafts].

Give me an example of a cross-curricular theme day for a [grade X] class on [specific theme, e.g. democracy], with three activities integrating [subject 1, e.g. Social Studies] and [subject 2, e.g. Swedish].
